name: Mind Wipe
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>記</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>憶</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>抹</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>消</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate only if your opponent has 3 or less cards in their hand. Your opponent adds their hand to the Deck and shuffles it, then draws the same number of cards they added to the Deck.
eff: Activate only if your opponent has 3 or less cards in their hand. Your opponent adds their hand to the Deck and shuffles it, then draws the same number of cards they added to the Deck.

action: Returns from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Deck
